narrative:
Milton-Combined township has 1,520 registered voters, with 44.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.9 percentage points.
